title: sambucus glauca var. velutina
intro: Sambucus glauca var. velutina, also known as Velvet Elder or Velvet Blue Elder, is a plant species in the Sambucus genus, characterized by its velvety leaves and stems. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Velvet Elder include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, such as colds and flu. Velvet Elder can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or syrup, and is often used to make medicinal concoctions, such as cough syrups and expectorants, to aid in the relief of respiratory issues.
